summary:
Recovery: Average

Reading: State
Average
Recovery 61 • Sleep 53 • Strain 100%

Read
The new log narrowed the energy gap, but most of the lift came without much muscle-supporting protein. With recovery still middling and daily movement already heavy for a rest day, this favors replenishment and muscle preservation over intensity.

Recovery holds the frame.
